reasoning: Mesotrione is 2-(2-nitro-4-methylsulfonylbenzoyl)-1,3-cyclohexanedione, a triketone herbicide featuring a benzoyl group attached to cyclohexane-1,3-dione, which directly classifies it as a benzoylcyclohexane-1,3-dione. The enol tautomer also supports a vinylogous amide character in the polyketide framework.
